description_long: This is a two-story commercial brick building with a flat, dark gray roof and a prominent corner entrance. The facade features large rectangular windows on both floors, with the ground floor windows serving as display areas for the real estate agency. The lower portion of the building includes a glass storefront with signage above, reading 'Cloth House,' and a recessed entry door. The upper story is clad in red brick, with regularly spaced sash windows, while the side and rear walls are simpler, with fewer or no windows and a transition to a plain, light-colored surface at the back. A small chimney and rooftop vent are visible, adding to the urban character. The overall design is typical of early-to-mid 20th-century urban commercial architecture, blending functionality with modest decorative elements.
description: A two-story red brick real estate agency with a flat roof, large storefront windows, and a corner entrance. The building features prominent signage and a classic urban commercial style.
description_view_0: Front corner view showing the main entrance, large display windows, and 'Cloth House' signage above the door.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the brick facade, multiple sash windows, and the building's flat roof with a chimney.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain wall, minimal windows, and a transition from brick to a light-colored lower section.
description_view_3: Back view dominated by a solid brick wall and flat roof, with a small rooftop vent visible.
